item.title: ByteDance’s AI Ambitions Are Being Hampered by Compute Restraints and Copyright Concerns
item.description: ByteDance’s new Seedance 2.0 AI video model seemed unstoppable—until heavy demand strained the company’s compute capacity and copyright complaints beg...

item.title: It’s Peak Season for Birdwatchers to Spot Migratory Hummingbirds, and Our Favorite Feeder Is on Sale
item.description: Early March is the best time to see rare migratory species in your own backyard, and a smart feeder can help you ID them.

item.title: The 10 Best Shows to Stream Right Now (March 2026)
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again, The Dinosaurs, and For All Mankind are just a few of the TV shows we’re springing for this month.

item.title: The Controversies Finally Caught Up to Kristi Noem
item.description: Donald Trump said he would replace the secretary of the Department of Homeland Security. Noem’s tenure was marked by aggressive anti-immigration tacti...

item.title: Why Fandom Discourse Feels Extra Cringe Right Now
item.description: Infighting and backlash among Heated Rivalry fans is most pronounced on X—fueled in part by censorship-driven migration from platforms like Tumblr.
